text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I visit the cafeteria and overhear two familiar
voices talking...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin! TAISHIN! You're always playing that
game!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Is it really that fun?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nope. It's just a bunch of dumb puzzles.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Then why do you play it?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Even if it's boring, I have to beat it. I feel like the
creator is mocking me if I don't.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's do it together, then! Two heads are better
than one, after all!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? No thank y—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm all ready to game! What do I do first?
Show me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You never let up, do you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: First, download the app on your phone...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, that's it. You got it?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Y-yep! Sounds super tough, though!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But I'm gonna beat it! Like this!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What?! I got a game over already?! Hooow?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That stage is Extreme Hell difficulty. Even I
haven't beaten it yet.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Really? I bet I can! Hraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, knock it off! There's no way you're gonna be
able to just—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Aaaaah! I did iiit!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! How?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? I dunno! I guess the secret is just never
giving up?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Hold on. My turn now. If I just do this, and then
this... Aha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The pair continue to game ferociously...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Done... All stages cleared...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Woohoooo! We did it, Taishin! We beat the
game!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Will you be quiet for once?! And it's not like we
did it together.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I'm so happy! I got to beat something with
you, Taishin! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...You're really easy to please, aren't you?
